type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Lower oil consumption due to a warmer year with less gas curtailments and lower steam production.  The slight increase in gas consumption was offset by the drastic reduction in oil.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Higher oil consumption due to colder winter and more gas curtailments.  EF for oil combustion is greater than EF for gas combustion.  Thus, the significant increase in oil consumptions had a significant impact to the emission.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Higher oil consumption due to colder winter and more gas curtailments.  Since EF for oil combustion is greater than EF for gas combustion, the significant increase in oil combustion is the primary driver for higher emissions.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Lower oil consumption due to a warmer year with less gas curtailments and lower steam production.  The slight increase in gas consumption was offset by the drastic reduction in oil. This plant also had partial firm gas with Enbridge starting 2016  which further reduced oil consumption during curtailment.
